free_text: Cross section measurements for proton induced
Production Facility at Los Alamos National Laboratory
Stacked target consisting of Al target box divided by
Al degraders into 10 compartments with identical
Between compartments an 1100-Al alloy of varying
thickness was used as energy degrader do degrade
proton energy by few MeV. In front and rear of the
stack a 0.127 mm stainless steel sheet with dimensions
25 x 25 mm2 was placed to determine beam profile. The
Gamma ray spectra were measured using two HPGe
detectors at LANL and UW-Madison. An ORTEC GEM HPGe
detector with a p-type aluminum window was used. This
detector has a FWHM of about 1.99 keV (at 1333 keV)
and an efficiency of 10%. At Madison an ORTEC GEM
HPGe detector with a p-type aluminum window was used.
This detector has a FWHM of about 1.99 keV (at 1333
